---
title: "Contact Me"
---

## Let’s Connect

Whether you’re a recruiter, hiring manager, or just someone in the same space, I’m always happy to connect.

<a href="mailto:angelaqian168n@yahoo.com">
  <img src="../images/yahoomail.png" width="25" style="vertical-align: middle;">
</a> <strong>Email</strong>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/qianangela1/" target="_blank">
  <img src="../images/linkedin.png" width="25" style="vertical-align: middle;">
</a> <strong>LinkedIn</strong>

---

I’m especially interested in roles in marketing analytics, benefits analytics, and account management, where I can combine data, strategy, and implementation to drive real business impact.

::: {.callout-tip}
### Quick Note

The best way to reach me is via email or LinkedIn. I usually respond within 24–48 hours.
:::
